items.target: Coordinator shell-only read workflow for snippets, recent changes, link checks, stale-index reports, cache status, chunks, backlinks, and sync status
items.verification: MCP JSON-RPC/server tests show equivalent read results through MCP tools without requiring shell-only coordinator commands for the covered queries

items.target: Fake-success or stub-like remote write contract for issue/wiki operations
items.verification: CLI/API tests prove unavailable write adapters return actionable errors and cannot persist successful audit events

items.target: diff_snapshot behavior that compares current/current for arbitrary unresolved snapshot ids
items.verification: Snapshot tests prove unknown base_id or head_id returns not-found instead of changed:false

items.target: Fixture-only active cache bootstrap that leaves real coordinator queries returning cache_empty
items.verification: Fixture-backed and optional live sync tests prove configured issue/wiki records populate cache and offline reads return nonempty results

items.target: Stdio-only MCP runtime as the sole product transport
items.verification: Runtime transport tests prove both stdio and HTTP/SSE server mode are available, with shared-cache multi-client reads over HTTP/SSE

items.target: Unscoped remote aliases such as issue:42 and wiki:Home as globally unique identities
items.verification: Two-repository fixture tests prove alias collisions are rejected or disambiguated by repo_id

items.target: Opaque config discovery that requires reading source code to know active paths and overrides
items.verification: CLI tests prove config locate and config show --redacted expose active config and precedence without secret disclosure

items.target: export_snapshot output that silently omits chunks or citable ranges when indexing has not run
items.verification: Export tests prove missing index state produces explicit warnings and indexed state includes chunks and citation ranges
